steps.title: Stay inside the graph
steps.content: The graph covers organizations filing Form 990-PF and shows percentages of total penalties by violation type and year. The correct statement must be a direct comparison supported by those bar heights.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: A brings in Form 990 filers outside the graph. B asks about average penalties, not shown percentages. C says self-dealing penalties increased every year, but the bars do not support that trend. The supported comparison is the larger minimum-distribution penalty share in 2003 than in 2005. The answer is D.
